name: Granular AWS Red Team Operation (Scanner & Burp Integration)
description: A highly detailed, granular testing plan. It decomposes general audit steps into specific Test Cases, integrates open-source scanners (Prowler, ScoutSuite, Nuclei), and adds Burp Suite API testing workflows for Lambda/API Gateway.

test_cases.name: External Asset Discovery (OSINT)
test_cases.description: Map the external attack surface using open source reconnaissance tools.

steps.title: Cloud Enum Enumeration
steps.description: Run cloud_enum to identify public S3 buckets, Azure blobs, and GCP buckets associated with the target.

steps.title: Nuclei Public Scan
steps.description: Run Nuclei templates against discovered endpoints to identify low-hanging vulnerabilities.

test_cases.name: Comprehensive Configuration Audit (Prowler)
test_cases.description: Execute Prowler to baseline the account against CIS benchmarks and security best practices.

steps.title: Prowler Full Scan
steps.description: Execute Prowler from the attacker machine against the target credentials.

test_cases.name: Multi-Cloud Visual Audit (ScoutSuite)
test_cases.description: Generate a visual HTML report of the attack surface using ScoutSuite.

steps.title: ScoutSuite Execution
steps.description: Run ScoutSuite to gather configuration data and generate the attack surface report.

test_cases.name: IAM User Permission Bruteforce
test_cases.description: Determine effective permissions for an IAM user when 'iam:GetUserPolicy' is denied.

steps.title: Pacu Permissions Enumeration
steps.description: Use Pacu's 'iam__enum_permissions' module to brute-force API calls.

test_cases.name: IAM Privilege Escalation Check
test_cases.description: Test for specific privilege escalation vectors (PassRole, Glue, etc.).

steps.title: Pacu PrivEsc Scan
steps.description: Run the automated privilege escalation scanner in Pacu.

test_cases.name: Lambda API Gateway Fuzzing (Burp Suite)
test_cases.description: Test Lambda functions exposed via API Gateway for injection vulnerabilities using Burp Suite.

steps.title: Burp Proxy Interception
steps.description: Configure browser/CLI to route traffic through Burp Proxy. Intercept a valid request to the Lambda URL.

steps.title: Input Fuzzing (Intruder)
steps.description: Send the request to Intruder. Fuzz JSON parameters and query strings with SQLi and Command Injection wordlists.

steps.title: OS Command Injection Test
steps.description: Specifically test for command injection (e.g., `; id`, `| cat /etc/passwd`) in input fields handled by the Lambda runtime.

test_cases.name: Lambda Function URL Auth Scan
test_cases.description: Check if the Lambda Function URL allows unauthenticated access ('AuthType: NONE').

steps.title: AuthType Verification
steps.description: Query the Function URL config.

steps.title: Unauthenticated Curl
steps.description: Attempt to curl the endpoint if AuthType is NONE.

test_cases.name: S3 Public Access Verification
test_cases.description: Verify if the bucket allows access to 'AllUsers'.

steps.title: S3Scanner Execution
steps.description: Run s3scanner to determine public read/write permissions.

test_cases.name: S3 Data Destruction Test (Ransomware)
test_cases.description: Test the ability to permanently delete objects or versions.

steps.title: DeleteVersion Check
steps.description: Attempt to delete a specific object version to bypass soft-delete protections.

test_cases.name: EC2 IMDS Exfiltration
test_cases.description: Exploit IMDSv1 to retrieve temporary IAM credentials.

steps.title: IMDSv1 Curl
steps.description: Curl the meta-data endpoint to retrieve role credentials.

test_cases.name: RDS Public Snapshot Exposure
test_cases.description: Check if RDS snapshots are shared publicly.

steps.title: Describe Public Snapshots
steps.description: Filter snapshots for 'PubliclyAccessible' attributes.

test_cases.name: EKS Public API Endpoint Check
test_cases.description: Determine if the Kubernetes API server is open to the internet (0.0.0.0/0).

steps.title: Describe Cluster Endpoint
steps.description: Check 'endpointPublicAccess' and 'publicAccessCidrs' configuration.

test_cases.name: EKS Vulnerability Scan (Kube-hunter)
test_cases.description: Run kube-hunter against the cluster to identify misconfigurations.

steps.title: Kube-hunter Execution
steps.description: Execute kube-hunter against the cluster endpoint.

test_cases.name: Redshift Public Access Check
test_cases.description: Verify if the Redshift cluster allows public internet access.

steps.title: Describe Clusters Public
steps.description: Check 'PubliclyAccessible' flag and associated Security Groups.

test_cases.name: Redshift Credential Extraction
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve temporary cluster credentials via IAM.

steps.title: Get Cluster Credentials
steps.description: Execute 'get-cluster-credentials' to obtain dbUser/dbPassword.

test_cases.name: Route 53 Dangling Record Takeover
test_cases.description: Identify DNS records pointing to non-existent resources (Subdomain Takeover).

steps.title: List Resource Records
steps.description: Enumerate all records and cross-reference with active S3 buckets/IPs.

steps.title: Nuclei DNS Takeover Scan
steps.description: Run Nuclei DNS takeover templates against the zone's records.
